steps: First bag: 2.5 kg initial weight, spill 0.375 kg, so remaining = 2.5 - 0.375 = 2.125 kg. Total flour needed = 12.125 kg. Flour still needed after using first bag = 12.125 - 2.125 = 10.0 kg. Each additional full bag weighs 2.5 kg. Number of full bags needed = 10.0 / 2.5 = 4 bags exactly. So she must buy 4 additional full bags.
